config.ai_gateway.title: AI Gateway
config.ai_gateway.disabled_desc: Enable the toggle to route LLM requests through Cloudflare AI Gateway for caching, rate-limiting and analytics.
config.ai_gateway.info: Routes all LLM API requests through Cloudflare AI Gateway. Provides caching, rate-limiting, logging and fallback capabilities. Local providers (Ollama) are excluded.
config.ai_gateway.settings_desc: Configure your Cloudflare AI Gateway credentials.
config.ai_gateway.status_no_credentials: Account ID or gateway ID missing
